name: Cirno
_design_notes: TH06 ecldata2: Sub0–Sub4 eight-lane + ins_77(180f) pacing; Sub5 burst E2→L10; Sub29 Icicle (120f outer loop ins_3); Sub30 Hail; Sub31 Perfect Freeze layered ins_75 + ins_67; Sub32 Diamond ins_75 type5 + ins_121 overlay.
Timing: 120f loop ≈40 mod ticks; 180f wait ≈60 mod ticks (wiki/time-and-units.md). ICE + ORB/GOLD for freeze/diamond reads (generic ORB + gold stars).

Blueprint (PatternStep): bulletLifetimeTicks matches PatternEngine defaults — RING/SPIRAL/DENSE 200, AIMED/SPREAD/LASER_BEAM 220, RAIN 230. AIMED_RING steps omit lifetime so aim uses 220 and ring 200. ringStartAngleRad: -1 = random ring start (RING_OFFSET / AIMED_RING ring), 0 = fixed. bulletAngularVelocity left 0 (straight); spawn offsets unused.

introDialog.speaker: BOSS
introDialog.text: I'm Cirno, the strongest fairy! You made it this far? Heh, now freeze!

reimu.speaker: BOSS
reimu.text: Hakurei shrine maiden! Perfect timing, I need someone strong to prove I'm the strongest!

reimu.speaker: PLAYER
reimu.text: You picked me for that? Fine. Let's make this quick.

reimu.speaker: BOSS
reimu.text: Quick? Good, then don't complain when you freeze even faster!

marisa.speaker: BOSS
marisa.text: Marisa! No stealing my ice crystals this time!

marisa.speaker: PLAYER
marisa.text: No promises, ze. If it shines, it's mine.

marisa.speaker: BOSS
marisa.text: Then I'll bury you in snow before you pocket a single shard!

sakuya.speaker: BOSS
sakuya.text: A mansion maid? Then watch closely, this is high-class freezing!

sakuya.speaker: PLAYER
sakuya.text: I only came to clear the path. Please stand still for a moment.

sakuya.speaker: BOSS
sakuya.text: Stand still? I only hold still for Lady Remilia, not for fairies.

sanae.speaker: BOSS
sanae.text: A wind priestess? Great! Ice plus wind means mega blizzard!

sanae.speaker: PLAYER
sanae.text: That sounds dangerous even by Gensokyo standards...

sanae.speaker: BOSS
sanae.text: Dangerous is how you know it's the strongest combo!

cirno.speaker: BOSS
cirno.text: Huh?! Another me?! Then only one strongest can remain!

cirno.speaker: PLAYER
cirno.text: You're right! Winner is strongest fairy forever!

cirno.speaker: BOSS
cirno.text: Then I'll beat you fair and square, no take-backs!

victoryDialog: No way... okay, maybe you're kinda strong too.
defeatDialog: See?! I'm the strongest after all!

victoryDialogByCharacter.reimu: Tch... shrine maiden cheated with experience.
victoryDialogByCharacter.marisa: Stop laughing! I only slipped on my own ice.
victoryDialogByCharacter.sakuya: Your knives are unfairly accurate... that's not strongest!
victoryDialogByCharacter.sanae: Fine, wind beats ice this time.
victoryDialogByCharacter.cirno: Whoa... strongest me wins. I can accept that.

defeatDialogByCharacter.reimu: Even shrine maidens freeze if they stand still!
defeatDialogByCharacter.marisa: Too slow, magician! No ice loot for you!
defeatDialogByCharacter.sakuya: Try stopping time when your feet are frozen!
defeatDialogByCharacter.sanae: No miracle saved you from the strongest!
defeatDialogByCharacter.cirno: Haha! I beat myself! That means double strongest!

phases._note: Nonspell 1 — Sub0–4: eight lanes; ins_77(180f) between volley families → ~56–60t-equivalent pacing on main ring.
Sub29 Icicle Fall: ins_82 ±π/2 columns; ins_3(120f) loop → RAIN + LASER_BEAM cadence ~40t-scale.
Sub30 Hailstorm: ins_47 spin + ins_70 hail density.
Nonspell 2 — Sub5-style burst scaling (E2→L10 single-shot families).
Sub31 Perfect Freeze: stacked ins_75 fans (burst volleys) + ins_67 spiral + large ORB wall.
Sub32 Diamond Blizzard: wide ins_75 snow + diamond sparkle (GOLD) mix; Normal+.
